constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No persisted graph node or edge writes.
No retrieval, embedding, reranking, or production index mutation.
Use CAP-0005 as diagnostic evidence only.
next_action: Seek admission for this proposed evidence-only evaluation/reporting slice before implementation.
objective: Evaluate CAP-0005 as an evidence-only diagnostic/reporting slice before any context-pack integration or graph-local scoped memory selection behavior is planned.
proposed_change: Add deterministic evidence/reporting around the read-only graph neighborhood advisor. The slice should apply CAP-0005 to repository fixtures or deterministic artifacts, record whether relation paths, authority labels, token estimates, and diagnostic inclusion/exclusion rationale are useful for future graph-local scoped memory, and produce a recommendation about whether context-pack integration should be separately planned.
rationale: PLAN-20260709-0002 completed the first read-only graph neighborhood advisor slice and recorded it as CAP-0005.
GAP-0002 remains open because graph-local scoped memory context selection is not implemented.
The updated GAP-0002 recommended first slice now points to evidence-only evaluation of CAP-0005 before integration.
Evidence-only reporting preserves the diagnostic boundary while making the next integration decision auditable.
risk: Evidence reports may be mistaken for approval of context-pack integration. This plan must remain reporting-only and must not admit any selector, prompt, retrieval, embedding, reranking, persistence, or automatic-inclusion behavior.
success_criteria: A deterministic evidence/reporting contract is represented in tests and source code.
The report applies CAP-0005 to deterministic artifacts or fixtures.
The report records relation paths, authority labels, token estimates, and diagnostic inclusion/exclusion rationale.
The report states whether context-pack integration should be separately planned.
The report preserves selection_effect none or equivalent no-selection-effect language.
Existing latest-context and context-pack behavior remains unchanged by default.
Self-model and audit tests remain green.
title: Evaluate graph neighborhood advisor evidence
